title: senecio nemoralis
intro: Senecio nemoralis, also known as Wood Germander or Woodland Groundsel, is a perennial herb that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, making it effective in treating coughs, colds, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Senecio nemoralis include reducing fever, alleviating headaches, and promoting relaxation. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can also be used in herbal remedies and decoctions.
